articles.title: Henry Zeffman: PM puts himself back in the game for now
articles.description: The prime minister has told the Cabinet a leadership contest had not been triggered, and that he wouldn't be resigning.

articles.title: BBC unmasks key people smuggler in network behind most small boat crossings
articles.description: The 28-year-old Iraqi Kurd has evaded arrest by operating under the alias “Kardo Ranya”.

articles.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
articles.description: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

articles.title: Green Party admits Polanski may have failed to pay council tax
articles.description: The Green Party admits that its leader has, until recently, been living on a houseboat in London and may have failed to pay council tax.
